chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-552 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.21046/2025 2. For order on CMA No.21047/2025 30.10.2025 Mr. Samiullah advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. By order dated 25.09.2025, this petition was dismissed for non- prosecution in the following terms: “This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 14.03.2023, which is nearly two and half years ago. In the last two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution.” We find that the petitioner has no reasonable ground for restoration of this petition, keeping in view the order dated 25.09.2025, reproduced above, which clearly indicates that the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition. Accordingly, the restoration application is dismissed. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
